subject: A humanoid figure in white chef or formal attire standing in an open outdoor field under blue sky
description: A single figure stands confidently in an open green field under a wide blue sky. The figure wears white clothing suggesting a formal or chef-like uniform with blue accent details. The stance is upright and self-assured. The background is a wide pastoral landscape with rolling greens and clear sky giving a sense of open space and calm authority.
foreground: Single figure in white formal/chef attire with blue accents
background: Open green field under blue sky
emotion: composed and confident; upright posture projects authority
